name: life-parental-control
description: LiFE Parental Control - KDE Plasma parental control tool
author: Thomas Michael Weissel

scripts.dev: sudo --preserve-env=DISPLAY,XAUTHORITY,WAYLAND_DISPLAY,XDG_SESSION_TYPE,XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP,QT_QPA_PLATFORM,LANG,LC_ALL,LANGUAGE env -u NODE_OPTIONS -u APPDIR -u OWD PATH="$PATH" XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$(id -u) DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=unix:path=/run/user/$(id -u)/bus ./node_modules/.bin/electron-vite dev -- --no-sandbox
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run compile
